This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-hr8g-2q7x-3f4w. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

### Original Description
OpenClaw before 2026.3.31 contains an information disclosure vulnerability in the Control Interface bootstrap JSON that exposes version and assistant agent identifiers. Attackers can extract sensitive fingerprinting information from the Control UI bootstrap payload to identify system versions and agent configurations.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-fjm8-mgc9-mf65", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-04T21:52:06Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fjm8-mgc9-mf65", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-fjm8-mgc9-mf65"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-23T22:16:39Z", "published_at": "2026-04-24T00:31:51Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-hr8g-2q7x-3f4w", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41335", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/c5c10adc022f42eb75ebb3bf364dd607738683b3", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-information-disclosure-via-control-ui-bootstrap-json", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fjm8-mgc9-mf65"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: OpenClaw Has a Gateway Control Interface Information Disclosure Vulnerability", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-04T21:52:07Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-fjm8-mgc9-mf65", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.3.31", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.3.31"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-05-04T21:52:06Z"}
